title: Crafted From Vanilla
description: A vanilla style pack with polished textures and tweaks while preserving the core style of the game
body:
[

![CurseForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/026201561576dffe9c021d2941061262797cee60.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/crasher120/projects)[![Modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e009480f2af8c79e3ea4e398338cae87e9ff8c31.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/Crasher120)[![BlueSky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f95aae0aa5dfa831a8022918c7b01becf079bbf6.png)](https://bsky.app/profile/crasher120.bsky.social)[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a7cde82586b398a24a306fc4948f278f877ae1e.png)

](https://discord.gg/RxhH3zTsjB) ![Crafted From Vanilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/443d6de4dae8395fa419b6fc67d2375e27e403fc.png) # Crafted From Vanilla _Crafted From Vanilla_ is a vanilla style resource pack containing tweaks, updates, and changes that are made for the lastest version of the game. When using this version of the pack you wont need to use Optifine or any other alternative modification. It can be played using vanilla Minecraft. # Crafted From Vanilla+ [_Crafted From Vanilla+_](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/crafted-from-vanilla+) includes additions that further expand on Minecraft's vanilla textures.\ When using this version of the pack **(Optifine)** or an alternative will be required.\ The pack includes custom models, connected textures, custom items, and mob variations.\ If you don't use optifine here is a link to some [alternatives](https://modrinth.com/collection/jkSMZaMr)! Join the Discord server [Here](https://discord.gg/RxhH3zTsjB) for more info, to give suggestions, and leave feedback! ![Armor and tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hesemoTs/images/5eafb98099f1bbbf9c0f12bbacdf0e6ff5dffa9b.png) ![Before and After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9252fa7d19a0bad217d222444801e513dcb6247.png)\ # Also check out my other packs [![wolves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/faca87567dc25962eda1c06d353892c81b5c769f.png)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/crashers-wolves) [![Equipment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85e1b6518c6bea77a1ef8e9aa97f211a05511475.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/crashers-vanity-equipment)
